## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on automation initiatives, particularly the follow-up email workflow and other AI-driven projects.](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sam has developed a working version of the follow-up email automation in N8N, integrating with Salesforce and using vector search for relevant documentation](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Marcel provided feedback on improving the detail and personalization of follow-up emails, suggesting use of GPT-4 and chain-of-thought prompting](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [The team is exploring various AI tools (N8N, Vellum, Typeform, Aeroops) for automation, but facing scalability challenges as projects grow](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [There's potential for a webinar in early December to showcase Deepgram's unique AI automation implementations](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

## Topics

### Follow-up Email Automation Progress

  - [Sam developed a working N8N workflow for automated follow-up emails](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Integrates with Salesforce using a custom object to trigger the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Uses Pinecone vector database to query relevant documentation based on call content](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Current version uses GPT-4 for email generation, but may switch to GPT-4-turbo-preview for improved detail](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

### Email Content Improvement Strategies

  - [Marcel suggested using full call transcripts instead of summaries for more detailed context](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Recommended chain-of-thought prompting to refine email content and style](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Discussed personalizing emails to match the AE's communication style](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Explored ways to address customer concerns and objections proactively in the emails](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

### AI-Driven Sequence Creation

  - [Sam is working on an evolution of the "auto op-amp" to create personalized outreach sequences](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Current challenge: personas only consider intent signals, not behavioral inputs](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Next step: incorporate Salesforce campaign data to enrich persona information for better sequence targeting](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### Recruitment Process Automation

  - [Deepgram is using an AI-powered system (possibly Workable) to streamline candidate screening](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
  - [System provides recommendations (no, maybe, yes) based on applicant responses and background](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Significantly reduces time spent on initial candidate review](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)

### Future AI Projects and Challenges

  - [Discussed potential for creating personalized ABM pages and auto-creating campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)
  - [Exploring ways to adapt web pages based on search intent for ultra-personalized experiences](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Noted challenges with current AI platforms (N8N, Aeroops, etc.) in managing large numbers of workflows](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=2368.0)
  - [Deepgram is building a custom runtime layer to address limitations of existing platforms](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=2345.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sam to continue refining the follow-up email automation, incorporating Marcel's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Explore using GPT-4-turbo-preview for more detailed and personalized email content](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [Sam to add more behavioral inputs to persona creation for improved sequence targeting](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Marcel to potentially involve Deepgram's CTO in future calls to discuss technical implementations](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)
  - [Plan for a webinar in early December to showcase Deepgram's AI automation projects](https://fathom.video/share/mS7zqCaNNf_LvRet4iZUEP1t3VwymayC?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
